Define (Enrich) a Custom SQL Cohort (Deprecated)

Source: R/manifest_helpers.R
defineCustomCohort.Rd

Deprecated. Use CohortManifest$addSqlCohort() instead, which registers a custom SQL cohort with the correct label, category, and tags in a single step.

Usage

defineCustomCohort(
  manifest,
  label,
  tags = list(),
  cohortId = NULL,
  sqlFilePath = NULL
)

Arguments

manifest

A CohortManifest R6 object.

label

Character. The user-friendly display name.

tags

Named list. Optional metadata tags. Defaults to list().

cohortId

Integer. The cohort ID in the manifest.

sqlFilePath

Character. Path to the SQL file.

Value

Invisibly returns NULL.

On this page
